learningObjectives: Recognise and use twelve Starters animal words including pets and zoo animals.
Use this and that to point to animals near and far.
Form regular plural nouns with -s (cats, dogs, birds).
Read about Mai's pets and a zoo visit with Nam and Anna.
Listen for animal words in dialogues at home and at the zoo.
Write and speak short sentences about pets and zoo animals.

vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Mai có một con mèo nhỏ.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: The dog is big and brown.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Con chó to và màu nâu.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Anna likes the fish in the pool.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Anna thích con cá trong bể.
Con khỉ là con vật Mai thích nhất.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: They see a big bear at the zoo.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Họ thấy một con gấu to ở sở thú.

vocabularyBank.exampleSentence: Mai goes to the zoo on Saturday.
vocabularyBank.exampleTranslation: Mai đi sở thú vào thứ Bảy.

grammarReference.explanation: This = gần người nói (This is a cat). That = xa hơn (That tiger is far away).
commonMistakes: This is tiger (×) → This is a tiger (✓)
That is near cat (×) → This is a cat (✓) — gần dùng this

grammarReference.structure: Plural nouns: regular -s (cat → cats, dog → dogs)
grammarReference.explanation: Thêm -s để chỉ số nhiều: one cat, two cats. one dog, three dogs.
examples: The birds are in the tree.
They see monkeys at the zoo.

grammarReference.structure: This/that + is + animal; plural with are
grammarReference.explanation: This is a dog. Those are birds. — số ít dùng is; số nhiều dùng are.
examples: The fish are in the pool.
commonMistakes: This are a cat (×) → This is a cat (✓)
The monkey are small (×) → The monkey is small (✓)

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Pets
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise and use cat, dog, bird and fish in short sentences.

exercises.title: Learn: Pet Animals
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best animal.

questions.questionText: It says meow and likes milk.
questions.explanation: Cat (mèo) — kêu meow, thích sữa.

questions.questionText: It barks and wags its tail.
questions.explanation: Dog (chó) — sủa và vẫy đuôi.

questions.questionText: It has wings and can fly in the sky.
questions.explanation: Bird (chim) — có cánh, bay trên trời.

questions.questionText: It lives in water and swims.
questions.explanation: Fish (cá) — sống trong nước, bơi.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Pets
exercises.instructions: Match each animal to its Vietnamese meaning.

questions.questionText: Match pet animals to their Vietnamese meanings.
questions.explanation: Cat=mèo; dog=chó; bird=chim; fish=cá.

exercises.title: Check: Pets Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Mai has a small black _____.
questions.explanation: Cat — Mai has a cat at home.

questions.questionText: Mai's pet dog is big and _____.
questions.explanation: Brown — The dog is big and brown.

questions.questionText: Anna likes the _____ in the pool at the zoo.
questions.explanation: Fish — Anna likes the fish in the pool.

exercises.title: Apply: Pets in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct pet word.

questions.questionText: Complete: Mai has a [0]. | The [1] is big. | Two [2] are in the tree.
questions.explanation: cat; dog; birds — thú cưng và chim trong vườn.

content.template: Mai has a [0]. The [1] is big. Two [2] are in the tree.

exercises.title: Review: Pets Mix
exercises.instructions: Mixed review. Choose carefully.

questions.questionText: Which animal is a pet at Mai's home?
questions.explanation: Cat và dog là thú cưng ở nhà Mai. Elephant ở sở thú.

questions.questionText: Which word means 'con chim'?
questions.explanation: Bird = con chim.

questions.questionText: Mai has two pets: one cat and one _____.
questions.explanation: Dog — One cat and one dog.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Wild Animals
lessons.learningObjective: Recognise elephant, monkey, bear and tiger in context.

exercises.title: Learn: Wild Animals
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best animal.

questions.questionText: It is very big with a long trunk.
questions.explanation: Elephant (voi) — to, có vòi dài.

questions.questionText: It climbs trees and likes bananas.
questions.explanation: Monkey (khỉ) — leo cây, thích chuối.

choices.distractorNote: Gấu không leo cây như khỉ

questions.questionText: It is big, brown and lives in forests.
questions.explanation: Bear (gấu) — to, nâu, sống trong rừng.

questions.questionText: It has orange and black stripes.
questions.explanation: Tiger (hổ) — có sọc cam và đen.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Wild Animals
exercises.instructions: Match each animal to a short description.

questions.questionText: Match wild animals to descriptions.
questions.explanation: Elephant=big with trunk; monkey=climbs trees; bear=big and brown; tiger=stripes.

exercises.title: Check: Wild Animals Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Mai says: This is an _____.
questions.explanation: Elephant — This is an elephant at the zoo.

questions.questionText: Mai's favourite animal is the _____.
questions.explanation: Monkey — Mai's favourite animal is the monkey.

questions.questionText: That _____ is far away at the zoo.
questions.explanation: Tiger — That tiger is far away.

exercises.title: Apply: Wild Animals in Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete each sentence with the correct animal.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is an [0]. | They see [1]. | The [2] are big.
questions.explanation: elephant; monkeys; bears — từ bài đọc zoo.

content.template: This is an [0]. They see [1]. The [2] are big.

exercises.title: Review: Wild Animals Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Which animal do you see at the zoo, not at home?
questions.explanation: Bear ở sở thú. Cat và dog là pet ở nhà.

questions.questionText: Nam says: Look at that _____!
questions.explanation: Lion — Look at that lion! (Nam at zoo).

questions.questionText: Which word is NOT a wild zoo animal?
questions.explanation: Dog là thú cưng. Elephant, monkey, tiger ở zoo.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Rabbit, Horse, Lion and Zoo
lessons.learningObjective: Use rabbit, horse, lion and zoo with other animal words.

exercises.title: Learn: More Animals and Zoo
exercises.instructions: Read each clue. Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: It has long ears and hops.
questions.explanation: Rabbit (thỏ) — tai dài, nhảy.

questions.questionText: You can ride this big animal.
questions.explanation: Horse (ngựa) — có thể cưỡi.

questions.questionText: It is the king of animals with a big mane.
questions.explanation: Lion (sư tử) — vua rừng, có bờm.

questions.questionText: Mai goes to the _____ on Saturday.
questions.explanation: Zoo (sở thú) — nơi xem động vật.

exercises.title: Practice: Match Animals and Places
exercises.instructions: Match each word to home, zoo or both.

questions.questionText: Match animals to where Mai sees them.
questions.explanation: Cat/dog=home; elephant/lion=zoo; bird=both (garden + zoo).

exercises.title: Check: Animals and Zoo Quiz
exercises.instructions: No hints — choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Where do Mai, Nam and Anna go on Saturday?
questions.explanation: Zoo — On Saturday Mai goes to the zoo.

questions.questionText: Which animal has long ears?
questions.explanation: Rabbit — The rabbit has long ears.

choices.distractorNote: Cá không có tai như thỏ

questions.questionText: The _____ runs fast.
questions.explanation: Horse — The horse runs fast.

exercises.title: Apply: Complete Animal Sentences
exercises.instructions: Complete with animal or place words.

questions.questionText: Complete: Look at that [0]! | They go to the [1]. | The [2] is sleeping.
questions.explanation: lion; zoo; lion — Nam và bài zoo.

content.template: Look at that [0]! They go to the [1]. The [2] is sleeping.

exercises.title: Review: Full Animals Vocabulary
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Which pair is correct?
questions.explanation: Mai's favourite = monkey. Cat/dog = pets at home.

choices.distractorNote: Hổ ở xa, không phải pet

questions.questionText: How many animal words are in this unit?
questions.explanation: Twelve words: cat, dog, bird, fish, elephant, monkey, bear, tiger, rabbit, horse, lion, zoo.

questions.questionText: Anna likes the _____ in the pool.
questions.explanation: Fish — Anna likes the fish in the pool.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: This and That
lessons.learningObjective: Use this for animals near and that for animals far away.

exercises.title: Learn: This vs That
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word.

questions.questionText: The cat is near Mai. She says: _____ is my cat.
questions.explanation: This — gần người nói dùng this.

questions.questionText: The tiger is far away. Anna says: _____ tiger is far away.
questions.explanation: That — xa dùng that.

questions.questionText: Mai points to an elephant near her: _____ is an elephant.
questions.explanation: This is an elephant — voi gần Mai.

questions.questionText: Nam points to a sleeping lion far away: Look at _____ lion!
questions.explanation: That — sư tử xa → that lion.

exercises.title: Practice: This/That Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with this or that.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] is my cat. | [1] is my dog. | [2] tiger is far away.
questions.explanation: This (cat gần); That (dog xa hơn); That (tiger xa).

content.template: [0] is my cat. [1] is my dog. [2] tiger is far away.

exercises.title: Check: This/That Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer. No hints.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: This is my cat — mèo gần Mai.

choices.text: That is my cat near me.

questions.questionText: The elephant is near. Best sentence:
questions.explanation: This is an elephant — gần → this.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is wrong?
questions.explanation: This is tiger sai — cần a/an: This is a tiger.

exercises.title: Apply: Order This/That Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: This / is / my / cat.
questions.explanation: This is my cat. — this + is + sở hữu + danh từ.

questions.questionText: Make: Look / at / that / lion!
questions.explanation: Look at that lion! — that + danh từ xa.

exercises.title: Review: This/That Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Mai holds her cat. She says:
questions.explanation: This is my cat — đang ôm = gần.

questions.questionText: The monkey is near Mai. Mai says:
questions.explanation: This is a monkey — gần → this.

questions.questionText: The bear is far. Best phrase:
questions.explanation: That bear — xa → that.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Plural -s
lessons.learningObjective: Add -s to make plural animal nouns: cats, dogs, birds.

exercises.title: Learn: Plural with -s
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct plural form.

questions.questionText: One cat, two _____.
questions.explanation: Cats — thêm -s: cat → cats.

questions.questionText: One dog, three _____.
questions.explanation: Dogs — dog + s = dogs.

questions.questionText: Two _____ are in the tree.
questions.explanation: Birds — two + birds (số nhiều).

questions.questionText: Nam sees three _____.
questions.explanation: Monkeys — three monkeys at the zoo.

exercises.title: Practice: Plural Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with the correct plural form.

questions.questionText: Complete: two [0] | three [1] | The [2] are in the pool.
questions.explanation: cats; dogs; fish — fish có thể giữ nguyên hoặc fishes; Starters dùng fish.

content.template: two [0] | three [1] | The [2] are in the pool.

exercises.title: Check: Plural -s Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form. No hints.

questions.questionText: Which is correct?
questions.explanation: They see monkeys — số nhiều + -s.

questions.questionText: The _____ are big. (bear — more than one)
questions.explanation: Bears — The bears are big.

questions.questionText: Which is wrong?
questions.explanation: Two cat sai — phải two cats.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Plural Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in the correct order.

questions.questionText: Make: Two / birds / are / in / the / tree.
questions.explanation: Two birds are in the tree. — số nhiều + are.

questions.questionText: Make: I / have / two / cats.
questions.explanation: I have two cats. — two + plural.

exercises.title: Review: Plural -s Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct form.

questions.questionText: Mai has one cat and one dog. She has two _____.
questions.explanation: Pets — two pets (cat + dog).

questions.questionText: The fish _____ orange. (many fish)
questions.explanation: Are — fish số nhiều → are.

questions.questionText: Three _____ play at the zoo.
questions.explanation: Monkeys — I can see three monkeys.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Mixed Grammar
lessons.learningObjective: Use this/that and plural -s together in animal contexts.

exercises.title: Learn: Mixed Patterns
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct word or phrase.

questions.questionText: _____ is an elephant. (near)
questions.explanation: This — voi gần → this.

questions.questionText: Two _____ are in the garden.
questions.explanation: Birds — two + plural birds.

questions.questionText: The monkeys _____ funny.
questions.explanation: Are — monkeys số nhiều → are.

questions.questionText: Best sentence: tiger far away
questions.explanation: That tiger is far away.

exercises.title: Practice: Mixed Gap Fill
exercises.instructions: Complete with this, that, or plural forms.

questions.questionText: Complete: [0] is my dog. | [1] lion is sleeping. | Three [2] play.
questions.explanation: This/That; that; monkeys — hỗn hợp this/that và plural.

content.template: [0] is my dog. [1] lion is sleeping. Three [2] play.

exercises.title: Check: Mixed Grammar Quiz
exercises.instructions: Choose the best answer.

questions.questionText: Which sentence is correct?
questions.explanation: This is my cat. It is small. — this + is + số ít.

choices.text: This is my cat. It is small.
That is my cat near me.

questions.questionText: They see bears. The bears _____ big.
questions.explanation: Are — bears số nhiều.

questions.questionText: Mai: One cat and one dog. I have two _____.
questions.explanation: Pets — two pets total.

exercises.title: Apply: Order Mixed Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: This / is / an / elephant.
questions.explanation: This is an elephant. — this + an + vowel noun.

questions.questionText: Make: The / fish / are / in / the / pool.
questions.explanation: The fish are in the pool. — plural + are.

exercises.title: Review: Mixed Grammar
exercises.instructions: Choose the correct answer.

questions.questionText: Anna: Me too. The fish _____ orange.
questions.explanation: Are — fish (nhiều con) + are.

questions.questionText: Which question uses this/that correctly?
questions.explanation: What is that animal? — hỏi con vật xa.

questions.questionText: Complete: Look at _____ lion! (far)
questions.explanation: That — xa → that lion.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Decode Familiar Words
lessons.learningObjective: Read animal words in context and match them to meanings.

exercises.title: Learn: Read Animal Words
exercises.instructions: Read the text. Then answer the questions.

passage.title: Mai's Pets and Zoo Visit
passage.text:
Mai is eight. She has two pets at home — a cat and a dog.
The cat is small and black. The dog is big and brown.

On Saturday Mai goes to the zoo with her brother Nam and her friend Anna.
"This is an elephant," says Mai. That tiger is far away.
They see monkeys, bears and birds. Anna likes the fish in the pool.

Mai's favourite animal is the monkey. "Look at that lion!" says Nam.
They have a happy day at the zoo.

questions.questionText: What is the main idea of the text?
questions.explanation: Bài về thú cưng ở nhà Mai và chuyến đi sở thú.

choices.text: Mai's pets at home and a zoo visit.

questions.questionText: Which word means 'con mèo'?
questions.explanation: Cat = con mèo — Mai has a cat.

exercises.title: Practice: More Animal Words
exercises.instructions: Read again. Find more animal words.

passage.title: Mai's Pets and Zoo Visit
passage.text:
Mai is eight. She has two pets at home — a cat and a dog.
The cat is small and black. The dog is big and brown.

On Saturday Mai goes to the zoo with her brother Nam and her friend Anna.
"This is an elephant," says Mai. That tiger is far away.
They see monkeys, bears and birds. Anna likes the fish in the pool.

Mai's favourite animal is the monkey. "Look at that lion!" says Nam.
They have a happy day at the zoo.

questions.questionText: Mai has a cat and a _____.
questions.explanation: Dog — a cat and a dog.

questions.questionText: The word 'elephant' is in the part about the _____.
questions.explanation: Zoo — elephant at the zoo.

exercises.title: Check: Decode Words Quiz
exercises.instructions: Read carefully. Choose the best answer.

They see monkeys, bears and birds. Anna likes the fish in the pool.

Mai's favourite animal is the monkey. "Look at that lion!" says Nam.
They have a happy day at the zoo.

questions.questionText: Which animal word is NOT in the text?
questions.explanation: Horse không có trong bài. Cat, dog, elephant, monkey, bear, tiger, fish, lion, bird có.

questions.questionText: Anna likes the _____ in the pool.
questions.explanation: Fish — Anna likes the fish in the pool.

exercises.title: Apply: Match Words to Animals
exercises.instructions: Use the text. Match words to descriptions.

questions.questionText: They see monkeys, bears and _____.
questions.explanation: Birds — They see monkeys, bears and birds.

questions.questionText: The word 'zoo' means:
questions.explanation: Zoo = sở thú — nơi xem động vật.

questions.questionText: Which word describes Mai's dog?
questions.explanation: Big — The dog is big and brown.

They see monkeys, bears and birds. Anna likes the fish in the pool.

Mai's favourite animal is the monkey. "Look at that lion!" says Nam.
They have a happy day at the zoo.

questions.questionText: When does Mai go to the zoo?
questions.explanation: Saturday — On Saturday Mai goes to the zoo.

questions.questionText: How do they feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Happy — They have a happy day at the zoo.

exercises.title: Apply: Match Zoo Facts
exercises.instructions: Match people and animals to facts from the text.

passage.title: Mai's Pets and Zoo Visit
passage.text:
Mai is eight. She has two pets at home — a cat and a dog.
The cat is small and black. The dog is big and brown.

On Saturday Mai goes to the zoo with her brother Nam and her friend Anna.
"This is an elephant," says Mai. That tiger is far away.
They see monkeys, bears and birds. Anna likes the fish in the pool.

Mai's favourite animal is the monkey. "Look at that lion!" says Nam.
They have a happy day at the zoo.

questions.questionText: Match zoo facts from the reading.
questions.explanation: Anna=likes fish; Nam=says lion; Mai=favourite monkey; tiger=far away.

exercises.title: Review: Zoo Reading Mix
exercises.instructions: Find details in the text.

passage.title: Mai's Pets and Zoo Visit
passage.text:
Mai is eight. She has two pets at home — a cat and a dog.
The cat is small and black. The dog is big and brown.

On Saturday Mai goes to the zoo with her brother Nam and her friend Anna.
"This is an elephant," says Mai. That tiger is far away.
They see monkeys, bears and birds. Anna likes the fish in the pool.

Mai's favourite animal is the monkey. "Look at that lion!" says Nam.
They have a happy day at the zoo.

questions.questionText: Mai says: This is an _____.
questions.explanation: Elephant — This is an elephant.

questions.questionText: They see monkeys, bears and birds. They also see fish in the _____.
questions.explanation: Pool — fish in the pool.

questions.questionText: The text is mainly about:
questions.explanation: Pets at home + happy zoo day with friends.

choices.text: Mai's pets and a fun zoo visit

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Where is your cat, Mai?

lines.text: This is my cat. It is small and black.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: And your dog?

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: That is my dog. It is big and brown.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: Do you have two pets?

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: Yes! One cat and one dog.

lines.speaker: Mum
lines.text: The bird is in the garden.

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: Yes. I can see two birds in the tree.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Zoo with Anna and Nam
lessons.learningObjective: Listen to Mai, Anna and Nam at the zoo and identify animals.

exercises.title: Learn: Listen at the Zoo
exercises.instructions: Listen to the zoo dialogue. Answer the questions.

script.title: Zoo Visit with Anna and Nam

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: Look! This is an elephant.

lines.speaker: Anna
lines.text: Wow! And that tiger is far away.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: I can see three monkeys!

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: The bears are big. I like the fish in the pool.

lines.speaker: Anna
lines.text: Me too. The fish are orange.

lines.speaker: Nam
lines.text: Look at that lion! It is sleeping.

lines.speaker: Mai
lines.text: My favourite is the monkey. The zoo is fun!

questions.questionText: What animal is near? Mai says: This is an _____.
questions.explanation: Elephant — This is an elephant.

questions.questionText: Which animal is far away?
questions.explanation: Tiger — That tiger is far away.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Write About Pets
lessons.learningObjective: Write short phrases about pets using this and animal words.

exercises.title: Learn: Pet Writing Frames
exercises.instructions: Complete the sentences about pets.

questions.questionText: Complete: This is my [0]. | That is my [1]. | I have two [2].
questions.explanation: cat; dog; pets — this/that + pet words.

content.template: This is my [0]. That is my [1]. I have two [2].

exercises.title: Practice: Order Pet Sentences
exercises.instructions: Put the words in order.

questions.questionText: Make: This / is / my / cat.
questions.explanation: This is my cat. — viết về thú cưng gần.

questions.questionText: Make: That / is / my / dog.
questions.explanation: That is my dog. — thú cưng xa hơn.

exercises.title: Check: Write About Your Pets
exercises.instructions: Write short answers. Use 1–5 words for each answer.

content.taskDescription: Write about pets using animal words from the unit.
prompts: 1. Write one pet word (cat, dog, bird…).
successCriteria: Uses at least one animal word
Uses this or a plural -s form
Spelling of core words is recognisable

modelAnswer.text: cat This is my cat. I have two cats.

grammar.criteria: Dùng this/that hoặc số nhiều -s đúng.

vocabulary.criteria: Dùng từ động vật trong unit.

organization.criteria: Câu ngắn rõ ràng; trả lời đủ phần.

taskAchievement.criteria: Hoàn thành nhiệm vụ; tối thiểu 5 từ (Starters).

questions.questionText: Write your response following the task.
questions.explanation: Chấm theo rubric. Bài mẫu cho thấy độ dài và nội dung mong đợi.

exercises.instructions: Choose the best written sentence.

choices.text: That is my cat near me.
This is my cat. It is small.

questions.questionText: Best sentence about Mai's dog:
questions.explanation: That is my dog. It is big.

choices.text: That is my dog. It is big.
This is my dog far away.

lessons.title: Lesson 1: Talk About Pets

content.sceneDescription: Mai's home after school. Mai is eight. She has a small black cat and a big brown dog. Two birds are in the tree in the garden. Her brother Nam is nearby. Her friend Anna visits sometimes.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: Do you have a pet? You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. / Yes, I have a cat and a dog.

choices.text: Yes. I have a cat and a dog.

questions.questionText: Someone asks: What is this? (near cat) You say:
questions.explanation: This is my cat.

exercises.title: Practice: Pet Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

content.sceneDescription: Mai's home after school. Mai is eight. She has a small black cat and a big brown dog. Two birds are in the tree in the garden. Her brother Nam is nearby. Her friend Anna visits sometimes.

questions.questionText: Mum asks: What colour is your cat? You say:
questions.explanation: Black. / It is black.

questions.questionText: Friend asks: Is your dog big? You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. It is big and brown.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About Your Pets
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions. Say at least one word for each question.

content.prompt: The examiner will ask you about pets at home. Answer in short phrases.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: Mai's home after school. Mai is eight. She has a small black cat and a big brown dog. Two birds are in the tree in the garden. Her brother Nam is nearby. Her friend Anna visits sometimes.
followUpQuestions: What is this animal — a cat or a dog?
How many pets do you have?
Say one sentence: This is my _____.

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ động vật (cat, dog, elephant…) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng this/that hoặc số nhiều -s trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Pet Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Point to your dog (far). You say:
questions.explanation: That is my dog.

questions.questionText: Say how many pets you have. You say:
questions.explanation: Two. / I have two pets.

exercises.title: Review: Pet Speaking
exercises.instructions: Choose the best spoken reply.

questions.questionText: How many birds in the tree? You say:
questions.explanation: Two. / Two birds.

questions.questionText: Describe Mai's cat. You say:
questions.explanation: Small and black.

questions.questionText: Say one sentence with this + pet. You say:
questions.explanation: This is my cat.

lessons.title: Lesson 2: Talk About the Zoo
lessons.learningObjective: Answer questions about animals at the zoo.

exercises.title: Learn: Zoo Speaking Phrases
exercises.instructions: Read the scene description. Choose the best answer.

content.sceneDescription: The zoo on Saturday. Mai, her brother Nam and her friend Anna walk around. They see an elephant near them. A tiger is far away. Three monkeys play. Big bears stand near a pool with orange fish. A lion sleeps. Mai's favourite animal is the monkey.

questions.questionText: Where are Mai, Nam and Anna? You say:
questions.explanation: At the zoo.

questions.questionText: What is near Mai? You say:
questions.explanation: An elephant. / This is an elephant.

exercises.title: Practice: Zoo Questions
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say at the zoo.

content.sceneDescription: The zoo on Saturday. Mai, her brother Nam and her friend Anna walk around. They see an elephant near them. A tiger is far away. Three monkeys play. Big bears stand near a pool with orange fish. A lion sleeps. Mai's favourite animal is the monkey.

questions.questionText: Examiner: What animal is far away? You say:
questions.explanation: The tiger. / That tiger is far away.

questions.questionText: Examiner: What is Mai's favourite animal? You say:
questions.explanation: The monkey.

exercises.title: Check: Talk About the Zoo
exercises.instructions: Answer about animals at the zoo.

content.prompt: Read the scene about the zoo visit. The examiner asks about the animals.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: The zoo on Saturday. Mai, her brother Nam and her friend Anna walk around. They see an elephant near them. A tiger is far away. Three monkeys play. Big bears stand near a pool with orange fish. A lion sleeps. Mai's favourite animal is the monkey.
followUpQuestions: Where are Mai, Nam and Anna?
What animal is near Mai? Say: This is…

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ động vật (cat, dog, elephant…) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng this/that hoặc số nhiều -s trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Zoo Speaking
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Nam points to the lion. You say:
questions.explanation: Look at that lion!

questions.questionText: Anna likes animals in the pool. You say:
questions.explanation: The fish. / I like the fish too.

exercises.title: Review: Zoo Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase.

questions.questionText: Mai says the zoo is _____. You say:
questions.explanation: Fun! — The zoo is fun!

questions.questionText: Describe the elephant near Mai. You say:
questions.explanation: This is an elephant.

questions.questionText: They have a happy day. You say:
questions.explanation: Yes! A happy day at the zoo.

lessons.title: Lesson 3: Plural Animals Speaking
lessons.learningObjective: Use plural -s when talking about more than one animal.

exercises.title: Learn: Plural Speaking Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

content.sceneDescription: The zoo on Saturday. Mai, her brother Nam and her friend Anna walk around. They see an elephant near them. A tiger is far away. Three monkeys play. Big bears stand near a pool with orange fish. A lion sleeps. Mai's favourite animal is the monkey.

questions.questionText: Examiner: How many monkeys? You say:
questions.explanation: Three. / Three monkeys.

questions.questionText: Examiner: What are in the tree at home? You say:
questions.explanation: Birds. / Two birds.

exercises.title: Practice: More Plural Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose what you would say.

content.sceneDescription: The zoo on Saturday. Mai, her brother Nam and her friend Anna walk around. They see an elephant near them. A tiger is far away. Three monkeys play. Big bears stand near a pool with orange fish. A lion sleeps. Mai's favourite animal is the monkey.

questions.questionText: The bears are big. You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. The bears are big.

questions.questionText: The fish are orange. You say:
questions.explanation: Yes. The fish are orange.

exercises.title: Check: Plural Animals Speaking
exercises.instructions: Answer the examiner's questions in short phrases.

content.prompt: The examiner asks about more than one animal. Use plural -s.
content.sceneDescription: Scene: The zoo on Saturday. Mai, her brother Nam and her friend Anna walk around. They see an elephant near them. A tiger is far away. Three monkeys play. Big bears stand near a pool with orange fish. A lion sleeps. Mai's favourite animal is the monkey.
followUpQuestions: How many monkeys can Nam see?
What are in the tree at Mai's home?
Are the fish in the pool?
Say: The _____ are big. (bears or elephants)

assessmentCriteria.pronunciation: Từ động vật (cat, dog, elephant…) nghe được rõ.
assessmentCriteria.fluency: Trả lời bằng từ hoặc cụm ngắn; không im lặng quá lâu.
assessmentCriteria.grammar: Dùng this/that hoặc số nhiều -s trong ít nhất hai câu trả lời.
assessmentCriteria.vocabulary: Dùng ít nhất ba từ vựng unit đúng nghĩa.

questions.questionText: Record your answers to the follow-up questions.
questions.explanation: Chấm tổng thể theo tiêu chí. Trả lời ngắn vẫn được điểm một phần nếu dùng đúng từ vựng.

exercises.title: Apply: Quick Plural Replies
exercises.instructions: Choose the best phrase for each situation.

questions.questionText: Say: two cats. You say:
questions.explanation: Two cats. — plural -s.

questions.questionText: They see monkeys and bears. You say:
questions.explanation: They see monkeys and bears. — cả hai plural.

exercises.title: Review: Plural Animals Speaking Mix
exercises.instructions: Choose the best reply.

questions.questionText: I can see three _____. You say:
questions.explanation: Monkeys — three + plural.

questions.questionText: The birds _____ in the tree. You say:
questions.explanation: Are — birds số nhiều.

questions.questionText: Say one sentence with plural animals. Best:
questions.explanation: Two birds are in the tree.

choices.text: Two bird is in the tree.
Two birds are in the tree.
Two birds is in the tree.
